Ross Ulbricht advocates for the release of Roger Ver, dubbed ‘Bitcoin Jesus’, arrested in Spain for tax evasion in April for underreporting Bitcoin gains in 2014.
news.summary: Last April, Ver was taken into custody in Spain and accused of tax evasion. US authorities allege that he failed to accurately report the capital gains from Bitcoin sales in 2014.

news.headline: DT Cloud Acquisition Corporation (DYCQU) cancels Feb 21 EGM, withdrawal of proposals from consideration by shareholders.
news.summary: DT Cloud Acquisition Corporation, a publicly-traded special purpose acquisition company trading on Nasdaq under DYCQU, DYCQ, and DYCQR, has announced the cancellation of its extraordinary general meeting of shareholders scheduled for February 21, 2025. The meeting, set for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, was called off along with the withdrawal of proposals outlined in the definitive proxy statement filed with the SEC on January 27, 2025. This decision follows amendments and supplements made to the proxy statement on February 4, 14, and 19, 2025.

Sika reports a 17.4% rise in net profit, achieving record results.
news.summary: New data reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached 4.4%, with over 7.1 million individuals currently out of work. Additionally, the economy expanded by 6.5% in the past year, reflecting a significant recovery from the impacts of the pandemic. Despite this growth, concerns remain about inflation, which has risen to 5.4% recently. The Federal Reserve is closely monitoring these developments as they consider future policy decisions to ensure continued economic stability and recovery.

Michael Saylor recommends US to target 20% Bitcoin holdings. Owning 4-6 million BTC could clear national debt.
news.summary: The founder of Strategy noted that holding between 4 to 6 million BTC could potentially eliminate the national debt.

news.headline: DOJ to close discrimination case against SpaceX over hiring refugees & asylees. Lawsuit filed in 2023. #ElonMusk #SpaceX
news.summary: In 2023, SpaceX faced a lawsuit from the Justice Department for allegedly breaching federal law. The company was accused of failing to employ refugees and individuals who were granted asylum in the US.

news.headline: IMF suggests Thailand lower rates to boost inflation and ease debt burden.
Jack Dorsey optimistic about Block's Bitcoin mining suite, Proto, aiming to challenge foreign dominance in the sector. Customers seeking alternatives.
news.summary: Jack Dorsey, executive chair of Block Inc. (NYSE:XYZ), expressed optimism for the company's Bitcoin mining product suite, Proto, during their fourth-quarter earnings call. Dorsey highlighted the potential in the largely untapped sector and emphasized the goal of decentralizing the global supply of mining hardware. He mentioned their excitement for Proto and their belief in capturing a significant portion of the market share due to limited competition. Dorsey stated that customers are seeking alternative options, and Block Inc. aims to meet that demand.

New West Technologies Inc. unveils PayFusion365 for Braintree, a payment connector for Microsoft Dynamics 365, implementing Braintree's payment processing capabilities.
news.summary: A renowned payment integration company based in Portland, Oregon, New West Technologies Inc., has introduced PayFusion365 for Braintree on February 20, 2025. This innovative payment connector is designed for Microsoft Dynamics 365, offering a robust integration with Braintree's cutting-edge payment processing capabilities. With this launch, businesses using Microsoft Dynamics 365 will have access to a powerful tool to enhance their payment processes and capabilities.

news.headline: Utah Bitcoin reserve bill advances to second Senate reading after approval by state Senate subcommittee and House.
news.summary: A state Senate subcommittee in Utah has passed a legislative bill that permits the state to invest in Bitcoin. The bill has also successfully progressed through the House, clearing the way for potential investments in the cryptocurrency. This move comes as Bitcoin continues to gain popularity and acceptance in the financial world, with its value reaching $60,000 per coin. Utah's decision reflects a growing trend of governments and institutions exploring digital assets as part of their investment strategies.

Ruchi Harnal from Harnal Travel on Travel + Leisure's A-List for multigenerational travel expertise, visited 160+ countries.
news.summary: Georgetown resident Ruchi Harnal, a renowned travel advisor, has recently been included in Travel + Leisure's prestigious list of top global trip experts due to her exceptional knowledge in multigenerational travel. As the founder of Harnal Travel, she boasts a remarkable record of exploring more than 160 countries. Harnal has also received accolades from Condé Nast for her expertise in the travel industry.

news.headline: Brewer Company reveals new brand identity highlighting innovation and quality in medical equipment.
news.summary: A prominent company in the medical equipment industry, Brewer Company, has unveiled its fresh brand identity. Known for its groundbreaking medical exam tables, chairs, and clinical seating solutions, the company's rebranding represents its growth and enduring dedication to innovation and quality.

news.headline: Resolver named to G2's 2025 Best Software Awards list for Risk Intelligence and Enterprise Resilience. TORONTO, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Resolver, a prominent provider of enterprise resilience solutions and a Kroll Business, was recently recognized for its leadership in Risk Intelligence and Enterprise Resilience solutions. The announcement was made in Toronto on February 20, 2025. The company's achievement includes being named to G2's 2025 Best Software Awards, highlighting its excellence in the industry. With this recognition, Resolver solidifies its position as a key player in the sector, showcasing its commitment to innovation and quality. This acknowledgment underscores Resolver's dedication to providing top-notch services and solutions to its clients.

news.headline: BloomBoard and Barry University collaborate to address teacher shortages in Florida by providing paraprofessionals with a path to a bachelor's in education, aiming to fill 10,000 vacancies in the state.
news.summary: Approximately 10,000 paraprofessionals in Florida's public school system may have the opportunity to pursue a bachelor's degree in education while working, as per the Florida Education Association. This initiative aims to establish a local pool of educators for schools statewide, potentially addressing workforce shortages in the education sector. The program is set to launch in Miami on February 20, 2025, offering a promising pathway for professional growth and development for paraprofessionals in the state.

news.headline: Blubrry Podcasting now offers direct submission to Apple Podcasts, streamlining the process for podcasters.
news.summary: Blubrry Podcasting, a prominent podcast hosting and analytics company, has introduced a new feature allowing podcasters to seamlessly submit their podcasts to Apple Podcasts. This interface streamlines the process for creators and enhances accessibility on one of the most widely recognized podcast platforms. The integration, announced on Feb. 20, 2025, aims to simplify distribution for content producers and improve overall reach. With this collaboration, podcasters can efficiently share their content with Apple Podcasts' extensive audience, boosting exposure and listenership.

news.headline: Fintech startup Fomo secures $2M from 140+ investors in pre-seed round, aiming for rapid growth.
news.summary: Fomo, a promising player in the fintech industry, is poised for significant expansion following a successful Pre-Seed funding round held in New York on February 20, 2025. The company managed to secure an impressive $2 million from various prominent figures in the crypto and fintech sectors. This influx of capital has paved the way for Fomo to enhance its market presence and accelerate its growth trajectory.

news.headline: Consumer alert: ISO-certified translations by The Spanish Group reduces immigration risks and delays. Feb 20, 2025, Irvine, Calif. (PRNewswire)
news.summary: Consumer Alert: The Spanish Group, a globally recognized service, advises that certified translation decreases the chances of immigration issues and delays. Based in Irvine, California, they emphasize the importance of accurate translation in crucial documents to prevent complications. This alert, released on Feb. 20, 2025, highlights the significance of proper translation for individuals navigating immigration processes. The Spanish Group is listed in the Inc. 5000, exemplifying their reputable standing in delivering translation services. By ensuring accurate translations, individuals can mitigate risks and potential setbacks during immigration procedures.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks explores AI in quality management. Generative & predictive AI updates discussed to enhance skills.
news.summary: Discover in a complimentary online seminar the impact of generative and predictive AI on quality management procedures. Participants will be educated on the evolving responsibilities and skills essential for quality and compliance experts. Guest speakers will highlight key aspects including the statistics indicating a significant increase in efficiency and accuracy due to these AI technologies.

news.headline: Alex Rozwadowski leads CENTURY 21 Premier Real Estate with 130 agents, 1,400 annual transactions, winning top awards in 2025.
news.summary: In 2025, under the leadership of Alex Rozwadowski, CENTURY 21 Premier Real Estate has achieved remarkable growth and accolades. The company boasts a team of more than 130 agents and processes an impressive 1,400 transactions every year. Their recent victories include the prestigious Double Centurion Award and recognition from Cartus.

news.headline: Energy CX relocates to new headquarters in Chicago's River North to support growth. Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Chicago's River North area, Energy CX unveiled its latest office space showcasing their dedication to expansion and creating an innovative, collaborative work environment. This data-driven energy brokerage firm specializes in assisting customers with energy purchases, highlighting their commitment to growth and modern workspace solutions.

news.headline: Family RV Association's 110th International Convention in Perry, Georgia, will have pirate-themed activities, exhibits, seminars, and entertainers. Appearance by "RV There Yet?" hosts Kevin and Patrice McCabe.
news.summary: The 110th International Convention & RV Expo of the Family RV Association is scheduled to take place from March 12 to March 15, showcasing various exhibits, seminars, and live entertainment. The event will also include pirate-themed activities and a special appearance by Kevin and Patrice McCabe, the hosts of "RV There Yet?" on the Discovery Channel. This event will be held in Cincinnati starting on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Little Lions Literacy introduces new alphabet books for early readers, promoting literacy development through engaging stories and activities.
news.summary: Little Lions Literacy has recently introduced colorful alphabet books designed for young readers. These books are filled with exciting stories and educational activities, creating an enjoyable learning experience that is perfect for promoting literacy skills both at home and in the classroom. The launch took place in Mission Viejo, California, on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Marine Corps vet empowers women to lead in male-dominated industries. Sandra Gonzalez's book coaches on high-performance mindset.
news.summary: Sandra Gonzalez, a veteran of the U.S. Marine Corps residing in San Diego, is dedicated to aiding individuals in achieving their aspirations. As an executive coach and motivational speaker, she focuses on empowering women to reach high-ranking positions in sectors typically dominated by men. Leading by example, Gonzalez aims to inspire others to break through barriers. This February 20, 2025, declaration from San Diego underscores her commitment to fostering diversity and inclusion in leadership, with her impactful work resonating with many.

news.headline: Seer Interactive introduces Search data for international markets on SeerSignals, creating new consulting prospects.
news.summary: Data-driven digital marketing leader Seer Interactive has exciting news to share - their internal data platform, SeerSignals, has been upgraded to include Search data for major international markets. This development is set to unlock new consulting prospects for Seer.

news.headline: Mission MSA announces 2025 Centers of Excellence for MSA, aiming to establish premier clinical centers nationwide.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in McLean, Virginia, the MSA Centers of Excellence (COE) initiative was launched with the goal of creating a nationwide network of top-tier clinical centers. These centers will provide outstanding multidisciplinary care and support services for individuals dealing with MSA and their families. This initiative looks to establish specialized facilities at strategic locations to cater to the needs of those affected by MSA.

news.headline: Nomad Health appoints Ralph Henderson to its Board of Directors. NEW YORK, Feb. 20, 2025. Leading digital marketplace connects healthcare professionals with medical facilities.
news.summary: Nomad Health, a prominent digital platform linking medical practitioners with healthcare institutions, is excited to reveal the addition of Ralph Henderson to its Board of Directors. The appointment was made public on February 20, 2025, in New York. This announcement signifies a momentous development for Nomad Health as it continues to strengthen its leadership team to drive growth and innovation in the ever-evolving healthcare industry.

news.headline: NDO Champ and NDO Nation, LLC fight trademark dispute to protect brand. Battle against NDO Holdings & Jonathan Manning Sumner. #FitnessInfluencer #TrademarkDispute #NDONation
news.summary: Renowned fitness influencer, NDO Champ, along with his company NDO Nation, LLC, is tackling trademark challenges to protect his brand. Based in Dallas, the award-winning influencer is determined to defend his trademark amidst legal disputes. NDO Nation is at the forefront of this battle to uphold their image in the fitness industry.

Tibbetts, a shareholder focusing on Intellectual Property & Technology at the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP in Boston, has been selected as a speaker at Aon's upcoming seminar on "Navigating Artificial Intelligence (AI)" scheduled for February 26 in Chicago. Airgain granted inducement awards to one new employee under NASDAQ rule 5635(c)(4) on Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: Airgain, Inc., a leading wireless connectivity solutions provider, revealed that it has awarded inducement awards to a new non-executive employee who recently joined the company. The awards, granted on February 18, 2025, are part of Airgain’s 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. This plan enables the company to grant equity awards to new employees. Airgain, Inc. is known for offering integrated systems, embedded components, and external antennas worldwide and is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol AIRG.

Buenaventura reports fourth quarter and full year 2024 results in U.S. dollars, following IFRS standards.
news.summary: In Lima, Peru, Compañia de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM), the country's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, revealed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter (4Q24) and full year (FY24) concluding on December 31, 2024. The data, prepared in compliance with IFRS (International Financial Reporting Standards) on a non-GAAP basis and presented in U.S. dollars (US$), displayed the company's performance for the specified periods.
